narrativeAtSnapshot: MakerDAO is the oldest and most battle-tested DeFi protocol, launched November 2019 with Multi-Collateral DAI. Survived Black Thursday (March 12, 2020) market crash — DAI system remained solvent despite $4M bad debt. DAI supply growing: from $100M pre-DeFi-summer to $1B+ by September 2020. MKR governance increasingly active with multiple collateral onboarding proposals. Real Yield Dai Savings Rate mechanism provides backstop. Mention growth: steady 1.5-2x week-over-week as DeFi TVL grows. Pre-mainstream — institutional DeFi users aware, but retail mainstream unfamiliar. Structural signal: 3 elite developers, oldest operational DeFi protocol, DAI is the blue-chip decentralized stablecoin with growing integrations across all major DeFi protocols. Foundation dissolving — pure community governance imminent.
